name: Pellet
description: A field of small discs swelling and shrinking from cell to cell, re-colouring on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; @size: @rand(28%, 76%); -webkit-transform: translate(-50%, -50%); transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
